root_cause: Configuration error: stale test topology linked 1.1.1.1 prefixes to non-production DLS service; second change triggered global prefix withdrawal

timeline_events.event: Configuration change triggered refresh; 1.1.1.1 prefixes began withdrawing
DNS traffic to 1.1.1.1 began dropping globally
Revert deployed to restore previous configuration

action_items: Implement staged rollback capability for service topology changes
Add pre-deployment validation that no active service prefixes link to non-production topologies
